> **PRIVATE DISCLOSURE PREFERRED**
> If this involves a vulnerability that could be exploited, **do not** file a
> public issue. Email `security@kix.example.com` instead, or use GitHub's
> private vulnerability reporting on this repository.
> Only use this template for *non-exploitable* hardening suggestions or
> general security hygiene tasks.

## Type
- [ ] Hardening suggestion (non-exploitable)
- [ ] Dependency / supply chain concern
- [ ] Process / policy gap
- [ ] Other
